description: Java source file defining various Data Transfer Object (DTO) classes related to officer-facing APIs for business loans, including queue items, application details, decision overrides, and audit events.

classes.name: OfficerDtos
classes.description: Container class for officer API DTOs.

methods.name: QueueItem
methods.description: Represents a summarized view of a submitted application in the officer queue.

methods.name: ApplicationDetail
methods.description: Detailed view of an officer application, including payload data, status, decisions, and timestamps.

methods.name: DecisionOverrideRequest
methods.description: Request object for overriding an automated decision, including decision outcome and justification.

methods.name: DecisionOverrideResponse
methods.description: Response object confirming an override action with previous and new decisions, reasons, and override timestamp.

methods.name: AuditEventResponse
methods.description: Represents an audit log event details for officer actions.
